title: NACP REST API Error Envelope
description: Body shape returned by NACP-conformant REST APIs for any non-2xx response. Distinct from ``error.schema.json``, which describes the payload of an inter-agent ERROR envelope. New in NACP 1.1.1.

error_detail.description: Structured machine-readable context. May be ``null``, an object, or an array. Implementations should put state-machine state, validation failures, and recovery hints here.

request_id.description: Echo of the response's ``X-Request-Id`` header. Implementations SHOULD populate this for traceability.

detail.description: Optional backwards-compatibility mirror of ``error_message``. Implementations MAY emit it during a transition window. Removed in NACP 1.2.
